sn35.19:1.1: “Monks, whoever delights in the eye delights in stress.
sn35.19:1.2: Whoever delights in stress is not released from stress, I tell you.
sn35.19:1.3: “Whoever delights in the ear delights in stress…
sn35.19:1.4: “Whoever delights in the nose delights in stress…
sn35.19:1.5: “Whoever delights in the tongue delights in stress…
sn35.19:1.7: “Whoever delights in the body delights in stress…
sn35.19:1.8: “Monks, whoever delights in the intellect delights in stress.
sn35.19:1.9: Whoever delights in stress is not released from stress, I tell you.
sn35.19:2.1: “Monks, whoever doesn’t delight in the eye doesn’t delight in stress.
sn35.19:2.2: Whoever doesn’t delight in stress is released from stress, I tell you.
sn35.19:2.3: “Whoever doesn’t delight in the ear doesn’t delight in stress…
sn35.19:2.4: “Whoever doesn’t delight in the nose doesn’t delight in stress…
sn35.19:2.5: “Whoever doesn’t delight in the tongue doesn’t delight in stress…
sn35.19:2.7: “Whoever doesn’t delight in the body doesn’t delight in stress…
sn35.19:2.8: “Monks, whoever doesn’t delight in the intellect doesn’t delight in stress.
sn35.19:2.9: Whoever doesn’t delight in stress is released from stress, I tell you.”
